title: pingraea nervosa
intro: Pingraea nervosa, commonly known as Kava, is a plant species native to the Pacific Island region, traditionally used for its medicinal and cultural significance. The health benefits of Pingraea nervosa include its anxiolytic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce anxiety and inflammation in the body. The therapeutic actions of Pingraea nervosa include its ability to interact with GABA receptors in the brain, producing a calming effect and relieving symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The bioactive constituents of Pingraea nervosa include kavalactones, specifically kavain, desmethoxyyangonin, and dihydrokavain, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
